title: cichorium esculentum
intro: Cichorium esculentum, also known as endive or chicory, is a perennial plant belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae) and is characterized by its edible leaves and taproot. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating digestive issues and skin problems. The health benefits of consuming endive or chicory include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Cichorium esculentum, such as teas and infusions, can be made by steeping the leaves or roots in hot water to utilize its medicinal properties.
